lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Coriolis
sources.what: Interactive outfitting & build planner used to verify jump range, mass and the exploration fit for this ship.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Ship slot layout, module variants, and engineering blueprint data.

sources.label: EDSY
sources.what: Alternate outfitting planner cross-checked for the SCO drive, Guardian FSD booster and engineered jump range.

sources.label: Inara — Corsair
sources.what: Stock hull stats, fuel tank/scoop capacity, and hardpoint/internal layout for this ship.

sources.label: Fandom — Corsair
sources.what: Manufacturer (Gutamaya), role assessment, and release history.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous (official)
sources.what: Frontier's official Corsair ship page — manufacturer specs, feature overview, and the ship render used on this page.
